name: Charlie's Holdings, Inc.
summary: Charlie's Holdings, Inc. is a premium vapor products company that formulates, markets, and distributes proprietary e-liquids, electronic nicotine delivery systems (ENDS), and alternative alkaloid vapor products. Key brands include SBX (containing Metatine, a non-nicotine alkaloid), Pacha, and PACHAMAMA disposables and e-liquids. The company is investing in AI-powered blockchain-based age-gating technology via a licensing agreement with IKE Tech LLC to support FDA Premarket Tobacco Applications for flavored nicotine vapor products.

products.name: SBX Disposable
products.description: Zero-nicotine disposable vape device containing Metatine, available in 18 flavors with 17,000-25,000 puff delivery and three firing modes.

products.name: Pacha 4mL Disposable
products.description: Pre-filled disposable vape designed for the US market offering a convenient and satisfying user experience.

products.name: Pacha 8mL Disposable
products.description: Disposable vape with higher puff count available in fruit, dessert, and Clear (flavorless) flavors.

products.name: Pacha 12mL Disposable
products.description: Disposable vape offering a popular puff-count option in fruit and ice varieties.

products.name: PACHAMAMA 20mL Disposable
products.description: Premium disposable vape with three power modes, screen display, and top flavors targeting international markets.

products.name: PACHAMAMA PLUS+ E-Liquid
products.description: Proprietary nicotine salt analog e-liquid line launched in 2024, not subject to some state flavor bans.

products.name: Pacha/PACHAMAMA E-Liquids
products.description: Proprietary e-liquids in variable nicotine concentrations (0mg, 3mg, 6mg) manufactured in ISO Class 7 certified US facilities.

products.name: Nicotine Salt E-Liquids
products.description: High-concentration (25mg, 50mg/mL) nicotine salt e-liquids for lower wattage open and closed system vaporizers.

products.name: IKE Age-Gating Platform
products.description: AI-powered blockchain-based age-verification system using BLE chips and cloud software to prevent youth access to vapor products.

partnerships.description: Master Hardware, Software, and Cloud Subscription Agreement signed December 18, 2025 to integrate AI-powered blockchain-based age-verification technology into Charlie's devices.
